calendar.matters:
Petition For Nunc Pro Tunc Order Correcting Legal Description In Order Settling First And Final Account And For Final Distribution And Order Confirming Remainder Beneficiaries Following Life Estate
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: George Montgomery for Janet Abbott, Elena Caruso and Leslie Schemel (Petitioners).

Mr. Montgomery stated that a consent by Wells Fargo Bank was filed on Monday. The Court raised the issue of notice to Douglas and questions whether the Personal Representative was discharged. Mr. Montgomery stated that he is not sure if she was discharged, that the personal representative is the same person as the surviving spouse, and that the order of final distribution gives 50% to the surviving spouse and that the other 50% went to the custodian of Donald. Mr. Montgomery also stated that title was recorded in 1985 with the property description that was provided by the Bank and prepared by First American Title, that the Family are doing some transactions with the property and that when attempting to open escrow the title company told them that the order and the description was no good. The Petition for Order Nunc Pro Tunc Correcting Legal Description, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Nunc Pro Tunc Order Correcting Legal Description In Order Settling First And Final Account And For Final Distribution And Order Confirming Remainder Beneficiaries Following Life Estate
Off Calendar Apr-29-2019 Continued To May-15-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
